title: It is time (that) + S + V-ed / It is time to V

formulas.zh: 是該……的時候了（應做但未做，用假設語氣過去式）
是……的時候了（更直接的表達方式）

explanation: 此句型表達事物已到應該進行的時刻。當使用 V-ed（過去式）時，帶有應當做但尚未做的含義，是虛擬語氣；加入 high 或 about 強調迫切性。不定詞形式 It is time to V 較為中性，不含虛擬意義。該句型常用於催促、建議或表達時機已到，學測常考其語法結構區分與時態搭配。

examples.eng: It is high time that you stopped wasting your time on social media.
examples.chi: 你早就應該停止在社群媒體上浪費時間了。

examples.eng: It is about time we left for the airport to catch our flight.
examples.chi: 我們該出發去機場趕班機了。

examples.eng: It is time to make an important decision about your future career.
examples.chi: 現在是時候為你的未來事業做出重要決定了。

examples.eng: It is high time that the government took action to reduce pollution.
examples.chi: 政府早就應該採取行動來減少污染了。

extension.tip: 判斷時用虛擬語氣 V-ed（應做未做的含義）vs 不定詞 to V（時機已到的中性表達）。V-ed 形式強調後悔、催促；to V 則單純表時機。注意 that 子句中用虛擬過去式，不用 should + V 替代（避免混淆虛擬語氣的兩種寫法）。

examples.test: It is time that you finished your homework. vs It is time to finish homework.
examples.result: → 前者帶催促與略顯責備；後者較中性，僅表現在是完成作業的時候

examples.test: It is high time we changed our attitude. vs It is time we change our attitude.
examples.result: → 前者用 V-ed 是正確虛擬語氣；後者用現在式不符規範，應改為 V-ed

examples.test: It is about time the company improved its service. vs It is about time the company should improve.
examples.zh: → 前者虛擬語氣正確；後者加 should 則為虛擬語氣的另一種寫法（但在 It is time 後較少見）

extension.note: 虛擬語氣用 V-ed，不定詞用 to V；high time 強調迫切，about time 表適當；該句型常考時態與語氣的區分。

parts: It is high time that we
exercises.sentence: It is high time that we finalized our plan for the project.
exercises.translation: 我們早就應該最終確定這個項目的計畫了。

exercises.sentence: It is about time you stopped thinking about your responsibilities.
It is time to think seriously about your college applications.
exercises.translation: 現在是時候認真考慮你的大學申請了。

parts: It is high time that the students
exercises.sentence: It is high time that the students put more effort into their studies.
exercises.translation: 學生們早就應該更加努力學習了。

vocab_table.zh: 非常必要的時刻、迫切的時刻

mc_exercises.question_chi: 填入適當的動詞形式完成句子，表達已到應該採取行動的時刻。
mc_exercises.question_eng: It is time that you _______ your mind about whether to apply for the university or not.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B (made)。'It is time that + S + V-ed' 是虛擬語氣結構，表示應當做但尚未做的事，動詞用過去式。A 項是現在式，不符合虛擬語氣；C 項是第三人稱單數，文法錯誤；D 項是動名詞，不適合此句型結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的句型表達應該停止浪費時間在不重要的事情上。
mc_exercises.question_eng: It is high time that we _______ wasting our money on unnecessary purchases.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B (stopped)。'It is high time that + S + V-ed' 使用虛擬語氣過去式，表迫切性與應當做但未做的含義。A 項是現在式，不符合虛擬語氣；C 項現在完成式不適用此句型；D 項未來式也不符合虛擬語氣的使用規則。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 完成句子，表達是時候該離開了，採用不定詞形式。
mc_exercises.question_eng: It is time _______ the office now; the meeting finished an hour ago.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C (to leave)。'It is time + to V' 是不定詞形式，較為中性，不含虛擬意義。A 項 'that we left' 是虛擬語氣形式也可接受，但此題重點在於選擇不定詞；B 項缺少 to；D 項 'for leaving' 介詞搭配錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷兩種句型的使用差異，選出強調迫切性的虛擬語氣形式。
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ that the government _______ stricter environmental policies; the pollution problem is getting worse every day.

options.text: It is about time that; implement

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B (It is about time; implemented)。'It is about time that + S + V-ed' 用虛擬語氣過去式，強調迫切性與應做但未做的含義。A 項缺少 that 且時態錯誤；C 項是不定詞形式，無法強調迫切性；D 項虛擬語氣後接 implement（現在式）文法錯誤。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我們應該開始準備期末考了。
translation_exercises.answer: It is time (that) we started preparing for the final exam. / It is time to start preparing for the final exam.
hints: 提示1：此句型表達『應該做某事的時刻已到』，可用虛擬過去式 V-ed 或不定詞 to V
提示2：虛擬語氣中 started 是過去式（非 have started），表示『應當做但尚未做』的含義

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 現在該是你們停止玩手機、專心念書的時候了。
translation_exercises.answer: It is (high) time (that) you stopped playing with your phones and focused on studying. / It is time for you to stop playing with your phones and focus on studying.
hints: 提示1：加入 high 強調『非常迫切』的語氣，虛擬過去式 stopped 和 focused 配合使用
提示2：注意複合動作的搭配，用 and 連接兩個並列的過去式動詞；不定詞形式用 to stop...and focus...

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 社會應該重視心理健康議題，而不是一直忽視它。
translation_exercises.answer: It is (high/about) time (that) society took mental health issues seriously instead of continually ignoring them. / It is time for society to take mental health issues seriously rather than continually ignore them.
hints: 提示1：虛擬語氣中 took 是過去式，表達『應該做但還沒充分做』；對比子句用 instead of/rather than 表達反面
提示2：continually ignoring/ignore 的選擇取決於前半句時態——虛擬過去式後用 V-ing，不定詞後用原形動詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 是該政府採取行動應對氣候變遷的時候了，否則未來世代將為此付出代價。
translation_exercises.answer: It is high time (that) the government took action to address climate change, or future generations will pay the price for it. / It is time for the government to take action in addressing climate change before future generations have to pay the price.
key_points: It is high time (that) + S + V-ed
hints: 提示1：在複雜句中，主句用 It is high time + V-ed（虛擬），從句可用現在式或未來式表達真實條件
提示2：虛擬語氣搭配條件句時，後半句保持真實時態（will pay）；不定詞形式用 before/in order to 表達目的或結果
